subject: A female-presenting vampire figure diving through a dim rocky chasm, dark hair streaming, mouth open revealing fangs, curved blade in hand
description: A female-presenting humanoid figure dives downward through a cold, blue-lit rocky environment. Her dark hair streams wildly behind her. Her mouth is open, revealing visible fangs — the primary diagnostic of a vampire figure. She wears dark fitted clothing with a belt and holds a curved blade. The entire scene is rendered in muted blue-gray tones, with dim rocky formations visible in the background and a faint moonlike glow in the upper area. The pose is dramatic and predatory, mid-swoop.
foreground: Female vampire figure mid-dive with curved blade
background: Rocky chasm with dim blue atmospheric light and faint moon
